notes: Two County-Executive Democrats absent from registry surfaced: Peter James (AI background) and Mithun Banerjee (project manager). Both should be queued for dossier_scout on the Windows side. SBE all-counties HTML is dynamic-rendered and the Linux sandbox could not parse it without bash; verification done via Baltimore Banner post-deadline candidate roundup and MD Bay News. The tier 3/4 offices (State's Attorney, Sheriff, Clerk, Register, Orphans, BoE, 6th Circuit Judge, Council At-Large) are NOT yet enumerated in the registry — flagged as required follow-up because the listener has voting rights on all of them.
